title: Science + AI Technology: Andhra Pradesh Class 9 — Forces and Motion
subject: Science

questions.text: A Hyderabad drone delivery robot weighs 5 kg and carries 2 kg load. To hover at constant height, motors must provide upward thrust equal to weight. Total weight = ? and what force law applies?

options.text: 70 N; Newton's 1st Law (balanced forces for constant velocity)

questions.explanation: Weight = (5+2)×10 = 70 N. For hovering (constant velocity = 0), net force = 0 → Newton's 1st Law: Thrust = Weight = 70 N. Amazon, Flipkart and Zomato are testing drone delivery in Hyderabad. Every drone hover uses Newton's 1st Law!
questions.subject: Science
